featureSections.title: Expert Auto Diagnostics & Repairs
featureSections.body: From check engine lights to major overhauls, our certified technicians use the latest diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately. We service all makes and models with transparent pricing and quality parts.
bullets: Advanced diagnostic tools for fast, accurate results
Transparent estimates and no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty on parts and labor, ensuring your vehicle is protected long after you leave our shop.

featureSections.title: Honest, Reliable Service Every Time
featureSections.body: We believe in building trust with every customer. Our team communicates clearly about needed repairs, provides detailed explanations, and never recommends unnecessary work. Your satisfaction is our priority.
bullets: Clear communication throughout the repair process
Complimentary multi-point inspection with every service
featureSections.cardBody: We offer complimentary shuttle service within Dallas and loaner vehicles to keep you moving while we service your car.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians

servicesPage.intro: At Dallas Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services to keep your vehicle performing at its best. Whether you need routine maintenance or major repairs, our certified technicians have the expertise to get the job done right.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake services to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. Our technicians perform comprehensive brake inspections, repairs, and replacements using premium parts. We service disc and drum brakes, ABS systems, and more. Whether you're hearing squeaks, grinding, or experiencing a soft pedal, we'll diagnose and fix the issue promptly.
benefits: Peace of mind with warranty-backed service

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect brake pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid levels.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We identify the root cause and provide a detailed estimate.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We replace worn components and test the system to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits and vehicle type. We recommend an inspection every 10,000 miles.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake trouble?
faqs.answer: Squealing or grinding noises, a soft brake pedal, vibration when braking, or the brake warning light on your dashboard.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and reliable engine repairs.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car isn't performing as it should, our advanced diagnostic equipment quickly identifies the issue. From minor sensor replacements to major engine overhauls, our skilled technicians handle it all with precision and care. We service all makes and models, ensuring your engine runs efficiently and reliably.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect to your vehicle's computer to read error codes and live data.

process.title: Physical Inspection
process.description: We perform a visual and mechanical inspection to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We complete the repair and test drive to ensure everything is working perfectly.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We recommend bringing it in for a diagnostic scan to find out.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour. Repairs may take additional time depending on the issue.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your car running smoothly with regular maintenance.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes and routine maintenance are essential for your vehicle's longevity and performance. We offer full-service oil changes using high-quality synthetic and conventional oils, along with fluid checks, filter replacements, and multi-point inspections. Our maintenance packages are designed to meet your vehicle manufacturer's recommendations.
benefits: Prolongs engine life and improves performance
Complimentary multi-point inspection with every service

process.title: Fluid Check
process.description: We check all fluid levels and top off as needed.

process.title: Oil & Filter Change
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with the recommended oil.

process.title: Inspection & Report
process.description: We inspect belts, hoses, tires, and brakes, and provide a detailed report.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual for specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What type of oil should I use?
faqs.answer: We recommend using the oil grade specified by your manufacturer. We offer both conventional and synthetic options.

services.title: AC & Heating System Service
services.longDescription: A properly functioning HVAC system is essential for comfort and safety. Our technicians diagnose and repair air conditioning, heating, and ventilation issues. Whether your AC isn't blowing cold air, the heater is weak, or there's a strange odor, we'll restore your system to peak performance. We also offer refrigerant recharges and compressor repairs.
benefits: Comfortable driving in all weather conditions
Improved air quality inside the cabin
Prevents system damage and costly repairs

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and airflow.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We identify leaks, electrical issues, or mechanical failures.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We fix the problem, recharge the system, and test for proper operation.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or an electrical issue. We can diagnose and fix it quickly.

faqs.question: How often should I service my car's AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years or if you notice reduced cooling performance.

about.headline: Your Trusted Auto Repair Partner in Dallas
about.mission: Our mission is to provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our customers safe and satisfied. We treat every vehicle as if it were our own.
story: Dallas Auto Repair was founded over 15 years ago with a simple vision: to create an auto repair shop that customers can trust. Our founder, a seasoned mechanic with a passion for cars, saw a need for transparent and reliable service in the Dallas area. Starting with a small team and a commitment to excellence, we have grown into one of the most trusted auto repair shops in the city.

Today, our team of certified technicians serves thousands of customers each year. We invest in the latest diagnostic technology and ongoing training to ensure we provide the highest level of service. From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, we approach every job with the same dedication and attention to detail. We're proud to be a part of the Dallas community and look forward to serving you.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always act with honesty and transparency, never recommending unnecessary repairs.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-quality parts and employ skilled technicians to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen, communicate, and go the extra mile.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We are proud to serve Dallas and give back to the community that supports us.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? We're here to help.
